The '''Kuras Asteroid Belt''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] in the [[Kuras system/Legends|Kuras system]] of the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. It orbited the primary star [[Kuras]], between the worlds of [[Kuras III]] and [[Kuras IV]]. The presence of an asteroid belt made travel to and from the Kuras system difficult. It was believed that the first probe sent to the area by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was destroyed within this asteroid field, thus keeping the system out of most star charts, leaving its planets undiscovered.
